provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales and battle scarring across the snout, a prominent bony crest ridge running from heavy brow ridges to the crown of the skull, fierce amber slit-pupil eyes, lipless jaw set in a permanent scowl showing teeth, barrel chest with natural aggressive forward lean, thick scarred tail raised showing confidence, wearing dark bronze chest plate and pauldrons shaped to follow the natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks and one deep gouge from a past fight that he wears with pride, a crimson Drashan house sash knotted at the waist over dark cured leather underpadding that shows sweat stains and conditioning oil, bronze vambraces on both forearms dented and scratched, a heavy straight-bladed sword in a battered leather sheath at the hip, small house badge riveted to the left shoulder plate with one rivet replaced
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
